stylePrefix: Dark-toned Japanese occult mystery adventure game illustration, early 2000s Japan atmosphere, cinematic muted color palette with deep shadows, subtle film grain, serious and melancholic mood, semi-realistic anime style, high detail
portraitSuffix: standing three-quarter body portrait facing the viewer, arms relaxed, neutral pose, soft even studio lighting, isolated on a solid uniform pure green chroma-key background (#00FF00), no background objects, no text
backgroundSuffix: wide establishing shot, no people, no text, atmospheric lighting, 16:9 composition

characters.name: 梯子（主人公）
characters.base: A 26-year-old Japanese man with slightly unkempt medium-short black hair, tired but gentle eyes, pale complexion, slim build, wearing a dark olive-green parka over a gray hoodie and worn jeans, ordinary and approachable presence

expressions.desc: calm neutral expression with a hint of melancholy
anxious troubled expression, furrowed brows, slightly open mouth

characters.name: 妹（姉）
characters.base: A Japanese woman in her early twenties with shoulder-length dark brown hair, soft kind features, wearing a cream-colored cardigan over a simple white blouse, warm and modest presence

expressions.desc: crying with tears, holding back emotion, trembling lips

characters.name: ドト子（ハラマオユミ）
characters.base: A strikingly beautiful Japanese woman in her late twenties with a sleek black bob haircut, porcelain skin, wearing an elegant thin light-gray business suit unsuited for winter, carrying a silver duralumin-like metallic case bag on her shoulder, otherworldly composed aura, slightly unnatural stillness

expressions.desc: calm expressionless face with piercing intelligent eyes

characters.name: 紳士（岡田派）
characters.base: A distinguished Japanese gentleman in his mid-sixties with swept-back silver-gray hair, deep-set handsome features like a classic movie actor, wearing an impeccably tailored dark navy three-piece suit with a silk tie, holding an umbrella, refined and enigmatic presence

expressions.desc: mysteriously soft and warm smile that feels both kind and unsettling

characters.name: ゆんゆん
characters.base: A young Japanese woman of indeterminate age with very long straight black hair, pale skin, wearing a simple dark long dress, faint knowing smirk, inhuman and uncanny composure, eyes that seem far older than her face

expressions.desc: slight mocking smile with cold observing eyes

characters.name: ブーツの女性
characters.base: A Japanese woman in her mid-twenties with short brown hair, wearing a beige long winter coat with a fur-trimmed collar and reddish-brown high-heeled long boots, elegant winter New Year outfit, unaware innocent atmosphere

characters.name: 知人
characters.base: A Japanese man in his late twenties with short black hair, wearing a black down jacket and dark pants, ordinary appearance twisted by desperation, hollow eyes

expressions.desc: desperate strained grin, eyes that avoid contact

backgrounds.prompt: Surreal key visual: a faint translucent ladder made of pale golden light rising from a rain-soaked 2008 Tokyo street at night into a vast dark sky filled with floating torn book pages, a small silhouette of a young man looking up at the ladder, wet asphalt reflections, quiet awe and melancholy

Japanese convenience store at night in heavy rain, view from under the storefront eaves, wet asphalt reflecting fluorescent light, vending machine glow, September 2008 Tokyo suburb, typhoon approaching

Small cramp Japanese studio apartment interior at night, dim warm desk lamp, low table with a folded memo and a small jewelry case, CRT computer monitor glowing in the corner, lived-in 2008 atmosphere

Extreme close-up of an old CRT computer monitor in a dark room, glowing text-board forum threads on screen, green-tinted phosphor light spilling into darkness, dust particles in the light, 2000s internet nostalgia, ominous
Quiet Japanese residential street at night, lonely streetlights, utility poles and tangled wires, long shadows, cold november air, distant lit windows

Quiet Japanese residential street on an overcast late autumn afternoon, utility poles and tangled overhead wires, low apartment buildings, pale grey daylight, dry fallen leaves on the pavement, cold quiet November air, empty sidewalk
Small Japanese police box (koban) interior in daytime, plain desk and pipe chairs, notice posters on the wall, fluorescent lighting, slightly worn public atmosphere
Cozy Japanese coffee chain shop interior, warm brown wood tones, small tables by a window, afternoon light through glass, steam rising from coffee cups, 2008

The same coffee shop interior but completely empty of people, unnaturally still and silent like a hollow diorama model, desaturated washed-out colors, pale white even light with no shadows, uncanny emptiness
Japanese train station concourse in the evening, ticket gates, departure board glow, polished floor reflections, but eerily few people, cold fluorescent light
Japanese shrine grounds on a clear winter afternoon of New Year, stone steps and torii gate, leafless trees, pale golden low winter sunlight, quiet tension in the air, January 2nd

Bright warm Japanese family living room in summer 2028, sofa with a napping cushion, watermelon on the table, sunlight through lace curtains, subtle near-future home appliances, nostalgic happy atmosphere with a faint uncanny stillness
Interior of a family car parked near a school in the afternoon, view across the front seats, empty passenger seat, light through the windshield, unsettling quiet
